title: Qatar news: Iran missile hits Ras Laffan, world’s largest LNG hub - Watch
summary_full: Iran attacked Qatar's Ras Laffan Industrial City, a major gas export hub. The strike caused significant damage to Liquefied Natural Gas facilities. Former US President Donald Trump issued a strong warning against further attacks on Qatar. This incident follows an Israeli strike on Iran's South Pars gas field. Iran's President had previously warned of severe global consequences.
